// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Stats"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableStats
    {
        private Stats _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableStats"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableStats(Stats record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Score = _record.Score;
            OptionalScore = _record.OptionalScore;
            Rating = _record.Rating;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Stats"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Stats Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                Score = this.Score,
                OptionalScore = this.OptionalScore,
                Rating = this.Rating,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Stats"/> to <see cref="MutableStats"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableStats(Stats record)
        {
            return new MutableStats(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableStats"/> to <see cref="Stats"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Stats(MutableStats mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Score.
        /// </summary>
        public int Score { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the OptionalScore.
        /// </summary>
        public int? OptionalScore { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Rating.
        /// </summary>
        public double? Rating { get; set; }
    }
}
